methodology.sapConversion: mg KOH/g ÷ 1000 = KOH coefficient; mg KOH/g ÷ 1402.5 = NaOH coefficient (ISO 3657 / FNWL)

references.name: From Nature With Love — Saponification Chart
references.role: Primary SAP cross-check (mg KOH/g, public table)

references.name: LDG International — Saponification Chart
references.role: Secondary SAP cross-check (same methodology as FNWL)

references.name: ISO 3657:2023
references.role: Lab titration methodology for mg KOH/g (supplier COA format)

oils.usageNotes: Lye consumption estimate only — not an ISO 3657 triglyceride SAP. Value proxied from pine tar; composition varies by grade and supplier. Calculator may include in lye math or treat as a trace additive.
